# HidayaSoft

> HidayaSoft is a faith-conscious software studio building modern digital solutions for the Muslim Ummah. A portion of all revenue supports Amana Fund — providing interest-free loans (Qard Hasan) to families in need.

## Products

- [HifzQalb](https://hidayasoft.com/hifzqalb): Free Quran memorization app for Android and web. Uses spaced repetition and active recall. Guided paths from daily prayer surahs to full hifz. No account needed, works offline, no ads — forever free.
- [Amana Fund](https://www.amanafund.org/): Interest-free microfinance (Qard Hasan) for families in need. HidayaSoft built and maintains their website and management software.
- HidayaERP: Business ERP — inventory, customers, suppliers, purchases, sales and payments with a customized analytics dashboard.
- School Management System: Digital administration for schools — student and teacher records, attendance, expenses, salary and tuition management.

## Mission

HidayaSoft was founded on the belief that technology should serve humanity while honouring divine guidance. Every product is built to be halal, trustworthy, and genuinely useful. A fixed portion of income flows back to the community through Amana Fund's charity work (sadaqah jariyah).

## Values

- Faith-first: All products respect Islamic values and ethics.
- Trust & privacy: Privacy-first design, no user tracking.
- Excellence (Ihsan): Modern, reliable software built to a high standard.
- For the Ummah: Real tools for real needs, with charity baked in.

## Languages

Available in English and Bangla (Bengali).

## Contact

Website: https://hidayasoft.com
